creator: freebsd@spambox.dk
text:
The "svnup 1.06" package keeps manipulating the "dtracetoolkit" files from the FreeBSD src repository at every run. This has been observed by me on the RELENG 10.0 src files.

--cut--
root@host# svnup release
# Revision: 271962
